name: view scope player nfl teams year offset range no splits
description: Locks player_nfl_teams + year_offset range alone (no splits) routes through CTE via should_use_cte widening; year_predicate omitted because CTE lacks year column
expected_query: with "t3d2efe2602a05b1642021b304ba51fb2" as materialized (select "player_gamelogs"."pid", count(*) as "rate_type_total_count", array_agg(distinct player_gamelogs.tm) as teams from "player_gamelogs" left join "nfl_games" on "nfl_games"."esbid" = "player_gamelogs"."esbid" where "player_gamelogs"."active" = true and "nfl_games"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_games"."year" in (2025, 2026) and "player_gamelogs"."year" in (2025, 2026) group by "player_gamelogs"."pid") select "player"."pid", player.first_name, player.last_name, (SELECT array_agg(DISTINCT t) FROM (SELECT unnest(t3d2efe2602a05b1642021b304ba51fb2.teams) AS t FROM t3d2efe2602a05b1642021b304ba51fb2 WHERE t3d2efe2602a05b1642021b304ba51fb2.pid = player.pid) sub) AS "player_nfl_teams_0", "player"."primary_position" from "player" where player.primary_position IN ('RB') group by player.first_name, player.last_name, "player"."pid", "player"."last_name", "player"."first_name", "player"."primary_position" order by 4 DESC NULLS LAST, "player"."pid" asc limit 500
